# GrokYtalkY
> Grok terminal companion: walkie, Strudel live coding, hex video, MIDI, xAI prompts.

Module: github.com/fornevercollective/grokytalky
Org: fornevercollective
Stack: Go, Bubble Tea v2, Lip Gloss v2, ffmpeg, WebSocket mesh

## Docs
- README.md
- AGENTS.md
- LLMS.md
- docs/

## Entry
- go build -o bin/grokytalky .
- ./bin/grokytalky
- ./bin/grokytalky serve
